questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно показывает прерванное действие в Past Continuous и Past Simple?

choices.text: She was cooking when the phone rang.
She cooked when the phone rang.
She was cooking when the phone was ringing.
She cooked when the phone was ringing.

questions.explanation: В предложении 'was cooking' (Past Continuous) описывает продолжительное действие, а 'rang' (Past Simple) — прерывающее событие.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильную структуру для описания прерванного действия.

choices.text: They were sleeping when the alarm went off.
They slept when the alarm went off.
They were sleeping when the alarm was going off.
They slept when the alarm was going off.

questions.explanation: Правильное использование Past Continuous (were sleeping) и Past Simple (went off) для прерывания.

questions.prompt: В каком предложении действие в Past Continuous прерывается коротким событием?

choices.text: He was walking when he saw a cat.
He walked when he saw a cat.
He was walking when he was seeing a cat.
He walked when he was seeing a cat.

questions.explanation: 'Was walking' (Past Continuous) и 'saw' (Past Simple) правильно отражают прерывание действия.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение содержит правильное сочетание Past Continuous и Past Simple?

choices.text: She was driving when the car stopped.
She drove when the car stopped.
She was driving when the car was stopping.
She drove when the car was stopping.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант для прерванного действия.

choices.text: They were working when the meeting started.
They worked when the meeting started.
They were working when the meeting was starting.
They worked when the meeting was starting.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно описывает прерывание действия?

choices.text: We were eating when our friends arrived.
We ate when our friends arrived.
We were eating when our friends were arriving.
We ate when our friends were arriving.

questions.prompt: В каком случае правильно использованы времена для прерванного действия?

choices.text: They were playing football when it started to rain.
They played football when it started to rain.
They were playing football when it was raining.
They played football when it was raining.

questions.prompt: Выберите предложение с правильной структурой прерванного действия.

choices.text: I was studying when the phone rang.
I studied when the phone rang.
I was studying when the phone was ringing.
I studied when the phone was ringing.

questions.explanation: 'Was studying' (Continuous) и 'rang' (Simple) — стандартная конструкция для прерывания.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно показывает, что действие было прервано?

choices.text: She was cooking when the oven beeped.
She cooked when the oven beeped.
She was cooking when the oven was beeping.
She cooked when the oven was beeping.

questions.explanation: 'Was cooking' (Continuous) и 'beeped' (Simple) — прерывание действия в рассказе.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильный вариант для описания прерванного действия в рассказе.

choices.text: He was reading a book when the cat jumped on the table.
He read a book when the cat jumped on the table.
He was reading a book when the cat was jumping on the table.
He read a book when the cat was jumping on the table.

questions.explanation: 'Was reading' (Continuous) и 'jumped' (Simple) — правильная структура прерывания в повествовании.
